entry.value: Exception occurred while performing 'Create' operation on identity 'EMP00317': Url: http://localhost:8080/identityiq-8.4/plugin/rest/eshiamEmployeePortalPlugin//createUser, Message: 500 : {"message":"Exception While Creating the User Please check server logs for more info.. \nUser_ID \u0027EMP00317\u0027 AlreadyExist...!!","quickKey":"580868"}, HTTP Error Code: 500
